---
title: "DI-2021 @ KDD 2021: Panel Discussion Recording"
description: "Recording of the Document Intelligence Workshop panel discussion at KDD 2021."
author: "synesis"
date: "2021-08-24"
categories: [NLP, conference, video]
image: cover.jpg
---

![DI-2021 panel discussion. [Watch on YouTube](https://youtu.be/qJsp7pdF4Rk)](cover.jpg){fig-align="center"}

Recording of PanelDiscussion in Document Intelligence Workshop @ KDD2021 with Kevyn Collins-Thompson, Heng Ji, Yunyao Li, Don Metzler and Cha Zhang, moderated by Dave Lewis.

Title: Document Intelligence Research Challenges & Directions

Program committee (alphabetical): Doug Burdick, Dave Lewis, Yijuan Lu, Hamid Motahari, Sandeep Tata
Chair: Benjamin Han


*Originally posted on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/posts/benjaminhan_panel-discussion-document-intelligence-activity-6836082867420962816-uazv).*
